BANKONGSETON

Cashless payments for the canteen — built by a student, for students.

The experience

Taps like magic.

Two cards, one tap. Students confirm a purchase with their money card, then their student ID — and it's logged in under five seconds.

A whole school, connected.

How It Works

From card to cleared in four taps.

01

Register

Admin taps a student's ID card once to create their record — no forms, no typing.

02

Load

Top up the money card at the station — cash or transfer.

03

Tap to pay

Student taps money card, confirms with ID. No cash changes hands.

04

Logged & notified

Balance, time, and item sync to the cloud instantly and ping the parent on every transaction.

Safety Checks

Security that parents can feel.

Two cards, one purpose: make sure money only moves when it should.

Dual-card required

Payment needs both ID and money cards. One card can't spend.

Lost-card flag

Mark a card Lost or Inactive in one click. Balance is preserved.

Full audit trail

Every transaction is logged with who, when, and how much.

Rate & cap limits

Default ₱500 per-transaction cap with rate limiting built in.

Fraud detection

Real-time suspicious-activity alerts across all stations.

Session auth

Login-protected dashboard with secret-key session auth.

Ready when you are

Bring BankongSeton to your school.

Two Arduino stations, one Flask backend, and a dashboard your admins will actually enjoy. Open source under MIT.
